_description: Multi-hop QA Knowledge Graph Ontology — designed for MuSiQue/HotpotQA/2WikiMultiHopQA
_design_principles: Every node and edge carries source evidence (exact quote from text)
Entity types are domain-specific, not generic
Only factual relationships — no IS_A/SUBCLASS_OF ontology noise
Each paragraph produces a 'Paragraph' summary node for provenance tracking

Organization.description: A company, institution, political party, sports team, government body

Location.description: A geographic place: country, city, region, body of water, mountain

CreativeWork.description: A film, album, book, TV show, song, painting, game

Event.description: A historical event, war, election, ceremony, competition

DateTime.description: A specific date, year, time period

extraction_rules: Each fact MUST have a 'source' field with the exact paragraph title it came from
Each fact MUST have an 'evidence' field with the exact sentence
Do NOT extract taxonomy/classification facts (X is a type of Y)
DO extract biographical, geographical, creative, and event facts
For multi-paragraph entities (same name in different paragraphs), merge their facts
Prioritize facts that connect entities across different paragraphs (bridge facts)
